description:
Perform a signal quality assessment on surgical Case 6 by identifying signal gaps (missing data or flat-lines) exceeding 30 seconds in the 'Solar8000/SPO2' and 'Solar8000/ART_MBP' tracks across the entire recording timeline. Create a report file at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\VitalRecorder\signal_quality_report.txt' using the following format:

SIGNAL QUALITY REPORT
=====================
Case: vitaldb_case6
Total Recording Duration: [HH:MM:SS]
Parameters Assessed: SPO2, ART_MBP

GAPS FOUND:
-----------
[List each gap found, or state 'No gaps exceeding 30 seconds detected' for the parameter]
Gap 1: Parameter=[SPO2|ART_MBP], Start=[MM:SS], End=[MM:SS], Duration=[seconds], Type=[no_data|flatline]
...

SUMMARY:
--------
SPO2 gaps count: [N]
SPO2 total gap duration: [seconds]
ART_MBP gaps count: [N]
ART_MBP total gap duration: [seconds]
Overall data completeness: [percentage]%
